seoTitle: Greenethorpe vs Greenfield Park — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Greenethorpe and Greenfield Park. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Greenethorpe vs Greenfield Park: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Greenethorpe and Greenfield Park.
heading: Greenethorpe vs Greenfield Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Greenethorpe, New South Wales and Greenfield Park, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Greenethorpe has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Greenfield Park (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Greenethorpe or Greenfield Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Greenethorpe has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Greenfield Park scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Greenethorpe scores 30/100 for bushfire risk. Greenfield Park scores 32/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Greenethorpe or Greenfield Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Greenethorpe has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.63% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
